tool_calls.name: send_command_to_device
tool_calls.content:
get system interface physical
== [onboard]
 ==[port1]
  mode: static
  ip: 7.0.14.1 255.255.255.0
  ipv6: ::/0
  status: up
  speed: 1000Mbps (Duplex: full)
  FEC: none
  FEC_cap: none

FortiGate-VM64-KVM # 
FortiGate-VM64-KVM #

tool_calls.name: send_command_to_device
tool_calls.content:
show firewall policy
config firewall policy
    edit 100
        set name "LAN-to-WAN-NAT"
        set uuid 868edb74-2aaa-51f1-7993-02c265357be3
        set srcintf "port2"
        set dstintf "port1"
        set action accept
        set srcaddr "all"
        set dstaddr "all"
        set schedule "always"
        set service "ALL"
        set nat enable
    next
end

FortiGate-VM64-KVM # 
FortiGate-VM64-KVM #

tool_calls.name: send_command_to_device
tool_calls.arguments:
{"device_identifier":"fortigate-firewall","command":"config firewall policy
edit 101
set name "Ubuntu-Restricted-Outbound"
set srcintf "port2"
set dstintf "port1"
set action accept
set srcaddr "all"
set dstaddr "all"
set schedule "always"
set service "HTTP" "HTTPS" "PING"
set nat enable
next
end"}

tool_calls.content:

config firewall policy
    edit 101
        set name "Ubuntu-Restricted-Outbound"
        set uuid b788ac20-2b5c-51f1-1c16-3471ba61ddac
        set srcintf "port2"
        set dstintf "port1"
        set action accept
        set srcaddr "all"
        set dstaddr "all"
        set schedule "always"
        set service "HTTP" "HTTPS" "PING"

    edit 100
        set name "LAN-to-WAN-NAT"
        set uuid 868edb74-2aaa-51f1-7993-02c265357be3
        set srcintf "port2"
        set dstintf "port1"
        set action accept
        set srcaddr "all"
        set dstaddr "all"

next
